text.title: Laravel Queues Examples
text.summary: ProcessOrderJob with WithoutOverlapping and idempotency check; Bus::batch for chunked export.

example.note: ID not model. WithoutOverlapping on orderId. Idempotency check. failed() updates status. retryUntil() bounds retries.
Full model payload, swallowed exception, no retry config, no failed() handler.
chunk by 1000 IDs; persist batch_id on Export model for progress polling via Bus::findBatch($id).
